welcome: Hello, {name}! 👋 🎉 Welcome to SliderAI UZ! 🎁 You received a gift balance of 2,500 UZS! ✨ Bot Features: • 🎨 Create professional presentations • 📊 30+ modern designs and themes • 🤖 AI-powered content generation • ✏️ Real-time editing (Mini App) • 📥 Download in PPTX/PDF format • ⚡ Ready in 2-3 minutes! 💰 Prices: • 6 slides - 1,000 UZS • 8 slides - 1,500 UZS • 10 slides - 1,700 UZS • 12 slides - 2,000 UZS • 14 slides - 2,200 UZS • 16 slides - 2,400 UZS • 18 slides - 2,500 UZS 👇 Use the buttons below to get started:
selectLanguage: Tilni tanlang / Выберите язык / Select language / Sprache wählen:
help: SliderAI UZ - Help 📝 Creating a presentation: 1. Click "New presentation" 2. Enter the topic 3. Enter your name 4. Enter teacher's name 5. Choose if outline is needed 6. Select number of slides 7. Choose a design 💰 Prices: • 6 slides - $1 • 8 slides - $1.5 • 10 slides - $1.7 • 12 slides - $2 🔧 Commands: /start - Restart the bot /new - New presentation /balance - Check balance /language - Change language /help - Help
enterTopic: 📝 Enter the presentation topic Example: "Ecology and Environmental Protection" Topic must be between 5 and 500 characters.
nameTooShort: ❌ Name is too short. Enter at least 2 characters.
askReja: 📋 Do you need an outline page? The outline shows the main topics on page 2.
paymentInstructions: 💳 Top up balance 🟡 HUMO: {humoCard} 👤 {humoOwner} 🔵 UZCARD: {uzcardCard} 👤 {uzcardOwner} ✅ After payment, send a screenshot. Admin will verify and top up your balance.
paymentReceived: ✅ Screenshot received! Admin will verify and top up your balance soon. Thank you for your patience! 🙏
topicTooShort: ❌ Topic is too short. Enter at least 5 characters.
topicTooLong: ❌ Topic is too long. Maximum 500 characters.
confirmGeneration: 📋 Presentation details: Confirm creation? 💡 1 credit will be deducted.
generationQueued: ⏳ Added to queue ID: {id} We'll notify you when it's ready.
insufficientCredits: ❌ Insufficient credits! Please top up your balance.
missingData: ❌ Data is incomplete. Please start over.
noPresentations: 📭 You don't have any presentations yet.

resume.enterName: 📇 Create a Resume (CV) Enter your full name: ❌ Press /cancel to cancel
resume.enterPosition:
💼 What position is the resume for?

Example: "Frontend Developer"
resume.enterContact: 📞 Contact info (phone, email, city) — on one line: Example: +998901234567, name@mail.com, Tashkent Send "-" to skip.
resume.enterBackground: 📝 Describe your work experience, education and skills (free text — the AI will structure it): Example: 2020-2023 worked as a frontend developer at ABC with React... graduated from TUIT... know JavaScript, React, Git...

glossary.enterContent: 📖 Glossary Send text or a topic to create a glossary. ❌ Press /cancel to cancel
glossary.contentTooShort: ⚠️ Text is too short. At least 10 characters.
glossary.confirmCreation: 📋 Confirm creating the glossary? 📖 Terms: {count} 💰 Price: {price} so'm 💵 Balance: {balance} so'm ✨ Alphabetical, with definitions, in Word (.docx).

crossword.enterContent: 🧩 Crossword Send text or a topic to create a crossword. ❌ Press /cancel to cancel
crossword.contentTooShort: ⚠️ Text is too short. At least 10 characters.
crossword.confirmCreation: 📋 Confirm creating the crossword? 🧩 Words: {count} 💰 Price: {price} so'm 💵 Balance: {balance} so'm ✨ Grid + clues + answer key in Word (.docx).

flashcard.enterContent: 🎴 Create flashcards Send text or a topic to create cards. 💡 For example: textbook text, a topic name, or a short description. ❌ Press /cancel to cancel
flashcard.contentTooShort: ⚠️ Text is too short. Enter at least 10 characters.
flashcard.confirmCreation: 📋 Confirm creating flashcards? 🎴 Cards: {count} 💰 Price: {price} so'm 💵 Your balance: {balance} so'm ✨ Each card: a question/term (front) and an answer/definition (back). Flip to review.
flashcard.creating:
⏳ Creating cards...

This takes a few seconds.
flashcard.ready: ✅ Done! 🎴 {title} 📊 {count} cards Flip the cards below to study 👇
flashcard.tapToReveal: Tap the button to reveal the answer
flashcard.sharePrompt: 📤 Share these cards with friends! Everyone who opens the link can study these cards right inside the bot.
flashcard.sharedIntro: 🎴 Cards shared by a friend: {title} 📊 {count} cards Flip them below to study 👇

document.ministryHeader: MINISTRY OF HIGHER EDUCATION, SCIENCE AND INNOVATION OF THE REPUBLIC OF UZBEKISTAN
document.enterTopic: 📝 Enter the topic ({type}) Example: "The process of photosynthesis and its importance" The topic must be 5 to 500 characters long. ❌ Press /cancel to cancel
document.enterInstitution: 🏛 Enter the name of your institution Example: "Tashkent State Technical University" It will appear on the title page.
document.selectPageCount: 📃 Select the number of pages: Prices are in so'm.
document.confirmCreation: 📋 Confirm creating {type}? 📝 Topic: {topic} 📃 Length: ~{pages} pages 💰 Price: {price} so'm 💵 Your balance: {balance} so'm ✨ Includes: title page, table of contents, introduction, chapters, conclusion, references. 📐 Format: Times New Roman 14, 1.5 spacing — ready to submit!
document.creationStarted: ✅ Document generation started! 🆔 ID: {id} ⏳ This may take 2-4 minutes. We'll send the Word (.docx) file when it's ready.
document.refunded: 💰 {amount} so'm has been refunded to your balance.

quiz.enterContent: 📝 Create Quiz Send textbook text or topic to create a quiz. 💡 For example: • Textbook text • Topic name • Brief description ❌ To cancel, type /cancel
quiz.contentTooShort: ⚠️ Text is too short. Enter at least 10 characters.
quiz.selectDifficulty:
✅ Question type selected!

📊 Select difficulty level:
quiz.selectQuestionCount:
✅ Difficulty selected!

🔢 Select number of questions:
quiz.insufficientBalance:
⚠️ Insufficient balance!
Required: {price} sum
Available: {balance} sum
quiz.topupInstruction: 💰 To top up balance, press /start and select "Top up balance".
quiz.creating:
⏳ Creating quiz...

This will take 1-2 minutes. Please wait...
quiz.creationStarted: ✅ Quiz creation started! 🆔 Quiz ID: {id} 📝 Questions: {count} ⏳ We'll notify you when it's ready. This will take 1-2 minutes.

completed.title: ✅ Quiz is ready!
completed.allSent: 🎉 All questions sent! 📊 Total {count} questions 💡 You can forward these quizzes to others!

channel.joined: ✅ Thank you! You can now use the bot.
channel.notJoined: ❌ You haven't joined the channel yet. Please join @{channel} first.
